rootCause: The ci-image.yml workflow fails 100% of the time with 403 Forbidden errors when using docker/build-push-action@v6 to push multi-platform images to GHCR. The repository's build.yml workflow successfully pushes using @v5 with identical permissions and configuration. The issue is a breaking change or regression in v6 that causes permission/authentication failures during multi-platform builds. The error manifests during HEAD requests to blob storage when buildx attempts to push multi-architecture manifests.
resolution: Downgrade ci-image.yml from docker/build-push-action@v6 to @v5 to match the working build.yml workflow configuration. The build.yml workflow has been successfully pushing multi-platform images to GHCR using v5 for months with the same permissions (contents: read, packages: write) and provenance: false setting. This is not a transient issue but a persistent regression in v6.
